title: Onboard Research — Project Config
description: Optional target-repo config at .claude/onboard-research.config.json that tunes the research roster: disable built-in dimensions and/or add custom specialists. Each custom specialist supplies a prompt or an agent reference and emits research-findings.json-shaped output so it flows through the same verifier and synthesizer.

disabledBuiltins.description: Built-in dimensions to turn off for this project.

prompt.description: Inline specialist prompt. Provide this OR `agent`. Capped at 16 KiB (matches the untrusted-input sanitiser leaf cap); the engine re-enforces this cap at dispatch since schema validation is opportunistic.

agent.description: Path to a user agent file under .claude/, e.g. .claude/agents/research-a11y.md. Provide this OR `prompt`. Must be a relative, .claude/-rooted .md path with no `..` segment (path-traversal guard); the engine additionally verifies the resolved path stays under the project root at dispatch.
